Name: [E2E] Publish Smart Summary and Smart Prep with Book Visibility Gate Verification
Precondition: User has valid System Admin credentials. Application is accessible at https://mod-lab-auto.boardeffect.diligentoneplatform-dev.com. UI-Workroom workroom (id: 5732) exists with Library access enabled. A built meeting book exists with AI content already generated via GovernAI (both Smart Summary and Smart Prep in 'Not visible' / unpublished state). The book must NOT be visible to workroom at the start of the test. Test book: id 30818 in UI-Workroom (id: 5732).
Objective: To verify the end-to-end Publish flow for Smart Summary and Smart Prep including the 'Visible to workroom' visibility gate: (1) Publish button is disabled with a visibility alert when the book is not visible; (2) enabling 'Visible to workroom' unblocks Publish without auto-publishing AI content; (3) publishing each item shows a confirmation alert and 'Published on' timestamp and changes the footer button to 'Unpublish'; (4) GovernAI panel reflects per-item status change from 'Not visible' to 'Visible'; (5) after both items are published the 'Regenerate AI content' footer button disappears and no outdated warning is shown.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate to the application URL
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: OIDC login page loads. 'Sign in to Diligent One Platform' heading is visible. Email and Password input fields and 'Sign in' button are present.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter the System Admin email in the Email field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated in the Email field.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter the password in the Password field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Password is entered and displayed as masked characters.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click the 'Sign in' button
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is authenticated and redirected to the BoardEffect application home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate directly to the Book details page (book id 30818)
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Book details page loads at /workrooms/5732/library/books/30818. Book title heading (h1) is visible. Book status shows 'Built'. 'GovernAI' button and 'Visible to workroom' checkbox are visible in the action toolbar.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the 'Visible to workroom' checkbox is unchecked
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=checkbox name="Visible to workroom" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Checkbox is present and NOT checked (no [checked] attribute). The book is not currently visible to workroom members. If the checkbox is already checked from a prior run uncheck it now and wait for the success toast before proceeding.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click the 'GovernAI' button to open the GovernAI panel
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: GovernAI panel opens as an active dialog overlay on the right side. Heading 'GovernAI' (h2) is visible. 'Generated on: {date}' and 'Last contributor: {email}' metadata paragraphs are shown. Smart Summary row shows status 'Not visible' and a 'Review & publish' button. Smart Prep row shows status 'Not visible' and a 'Review & publish' button. Footer contains 'Close' button and 'Regenerate AI content' button.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Review & publish' for the Smart Summary row
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Review & publish" (first instance — Smart Summary row) | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Smart Summary sub-view opens inside the GovernAI panel. Heading shows 'Smart Summary - {Book Title}' (h2). 'Go back' button and 'Close governAI panel' button are visible. An alert reads: 'You can only publish the Smart Summary after you make the book visible.' 'Generated by AI' label is present. AI content sections Executive Summary (h2) and Detailed Summary (h2) are displayed. Footer shows 'Edit' button and 'Download' button and 'Publish' button — Publish is DISABLED ([disabled] attribute set).

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the Publish button is disabled and the visibility alert is present in the Smart Summary sub-view
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Publish button has the [disabled] attribute and cannot be clicked. The alert with text 'You can only publish the Smart Summary after you make the book visible.' is visible at the top of the sub-view content area. This confirms book visibility is a hard prerequisite for publishing AI content.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Go back' to return to the GovernAI main panel
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Go back" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: GovernAI main panel is shown. Smart Summary row still shows 'Not visible' status and 'Review & publish' button. Smart Prep row still shows 'Not visible' status and 'Review & publish' button. Footer shows 'Close' and 'Regenerate AI content' buttons. Panel state is unchanged.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Close governAI panel' to close the panel
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Close governAI panel" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: GovernAI dialog closes. Book details page is fully visible. 'Visible to workroom' checkbox remains unchecked.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Check the 'Visible to workroom' checkbox to make the book visible
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=checkbox name="Visible to workroom" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Checkbox becomes checked ([checked] attribute). A success toast notification appears with text 'Book is set to ''Visible'''. The book is now visible to workroom members.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click the 'GovernAI' button to reopen the panel and verify AI row statuses are unchanged
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: GovernAI panel reopens. AI content row statuses are unchanged — both Smart Summary and Smart Prep still show 'Not visible' status and 'Review & publish' buttons. Making the book visible does NOT automatically publish AI content; each item must be explicitly published by the user.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Review & publish' for the Smart Summary row (book is now visible)
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Review & publish" (first instance — Smart Summary row) | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Smart Summary sub-view opens. Heading shows 'Smart Summary - {Book Title}' (h2). 'Generated by AI' label is present. AI content sections are displayed. The visibility alert 'You can only publish the Smart Summary after you make the book visible.' is ABSENT. Footer shows 'Edit' button and 'Download' button and 'Publish' button — Publish is ENABLED (no [disabled] attribute).

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the Publish button is enabled and no visibility alert is shown
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Publish button is fully enabled (no [disabled] attribute). No visibility alert is present in the sub-view. This confirms the visibility gate has been cleared and the summary can now be published.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Publish' to publish the Smart Summary
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Smart Summary is published. An alert element appears at the top of the sub-view with text 'Smart Summary published' and a dismissible Close button. A new paragraph 'Published on: {date/time}' appears. 'Generated by AI' label remains visible. Footer button changes from 'Publish' to 'Unpublish' confirming the content is now live.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the complete post-publish state of the Smart Summary sub-view
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: All of the following are confirmed: (1) alert text 'Smart Summary published' is visible within the sub-view. (2) Paragraph 'Published on: {date/time}' is present. (3) Footer shows 'Edit' button and 'Download' button and 'Unpublish' button. (4) 'Publish' button is no longer in the footer. Smart Summary is now visible to workroom members.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Go back' to return to the GovernAI main panel and verify the mixed state
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Go back" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: GovernAI main panel shows a mixed per-item state: Smart Summary row now shows status 'Visible' and button 'Review & unpublish'. Smart Prep row still shows status 'Not visible' and button 'Review & publish'. The 'Regenerate AI content' button is still present in the footer. This confirms that published status is tracked independently per item.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Review & publish' for the Smart Prep row
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Review & publish" (Smart Prep row — only remaining 'Review & publish' button) | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Smart Prep sub-view opens. Heading shows 'Smart Prep - {Book Title}' (h2). 'Go back' button and 'Close governAI panel' button are visible. 'Generated by AI' label is present. No visibility alert is shown (book is still visible). Footer shows 'Edit' button and 'Download' button and 'Publish' button — Publish is ENABLED.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Publish' to publish Smart Prep
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Smart Prep is published. An alert appears with text 'Smart Prep published' and a dismissible Close button. A paragraph 'Published on: {date/time}' appears. Footer button changes from 'Publish' to 'Unpublish'.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the complete post-publish state of the Smart Prep sub-view
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: All of the following are confirmed: (1) alert text 'Smart Prep published' is visible. (2) Paragraph 'Published on: {date/time}' is present. (3) Footer shows 'Edit' button and 'Download' button and 'Unpublish' button. Smart Prep is now visible to workroom members.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Go back' and verify the fully published GovernAI panel state
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Go back" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: GovernAI main panel shows the fully published state. All of the following are confirmed: (1) No 'AI content is outdated.' warning note is present. (2) 'Generated on: {date}' and 'Last contributor: {email}' metadata are still visible. (3) Smart Summary row shows status 'Visible' and button 'Review & unpublish'. (4) Smart Prep row shows status 'Visible' and button 'Review & unpublish'. (5) Footer shows 'Close' button ONLY — the 'Regenerate AI content' button is no longer present once both items are published.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Close governAI panel' to close the panel and complete the test
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Close governAI panel" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: GovernAI panel closes. Book details page is fully visible. 'Visible to workroom' checkbox remains checked. Both Smart Summary and Smart Prep have been successfully published and are now visible to workroom members. The end-to-end publish flow with the visibility gate has been verified.
